Extremely attentive and kind wait staff. Owner himself came to take our orders (he admittedly was pushy about keeping the potatoes in the Shaking Beef dish, as I wanted to sub for jasmine rice), however we very quickly discovered his judgement was infact correct. The potatoes were simply outstanding, as was nearly everything else about the dishes. Although I am biased, I think the Shaking Beef dish is one of their best to offer. The wait staff was kind and extremely attentive, as I, who only ordered a water, never had to verbally request a refill. Our food came out in a surprisingly quick time and was cooked to perfection. Clearly a top SF Vietnamese cuisine restaurant!
(Family members ordered Pho Soup *vegetarian and Pho Soup *Chicken)

We got a table of 7 ppl here, i think it was the owner who came and served us, he was pretty arrogant, and kept saying they got the best food and best prices, now as Asian this wasnt the case, we had couple of phos, i think it wasnt the best the best place, although they do know what to charge, we ask for extra bowls and he even said “what for, everyone order the almost the same thing, just give the bowls “whats the problem” i mean this place os mainly aim for tourist etc. 

Charging 20% for service charge of party over 5-7 ppl is really “rip off” if the service was attentive etc. and reallly worth it then alright, but seriously it wasnt worth the penny !! 

Wld not come again when in SF !
